name: MVP - Presentation AI Podcast Video Composer

parameters.formDescription: Upload a PDF or PPTX, then generate a page-by-page AI podcast explanation video.

values.placeholder: 可选：补充受众、观点、讲解重点或语气要求

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, jobId: $json.jobId, reviewDir: $json.reviewDir, videoPath: $json.videoPath, audioPath: $json.audioPath, pageScriptPath: $json.pageScriptPath, pageTimingPath: $json.pageTimingPath, subtitlePath: $json.subtitlePath, costPath: $json.costPath, ffmpegLog: $json.ffmpegLog, size: $json.size, pageCount: $json.pageCount, totalDuration: $json.totalDuration, generatedScriptTitle: $json.generatedScriptTitle, generatedScriptSummary: $json.generatedScriptSummary, cost: $json.cost } }}
